sentences.arabic: زَارَ أَحْمَدُ مَطْعَمًا تَقْلِيدِيًّا كَبِيرًا مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je posjetio veliki tradicionalni restoran sa svojom porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed visited a large traditional restaurant with his family.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبُوا الْمَشْوِيَّاتِ اللَّذِيذَةَ وَالْأَرُزَّ مَعَ السَّلَطَةِ الْخَضْرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Naručili su ukusan roštilj i rižu sa zelenom salatom.
sentences.translationEn: They ordered delicious grilled meats and rice with green salad.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّعَامُ طَيِّبًا جِدًّا وَالْخِدْمَةُ فِي الْمَطْعَمِ مُمْتَازَةً.
sentences.translation: Hrana je bila veoma dobra, a usluga u restoranu odlična.
sentences.translationEn: The food was very good and the service in the restaurant was excellent.
